title: Smart Department Network Simulation Using Cisco Packet Tracer and IoT
description: Developed a smart office network simulation using Cisco Packet Tracer with VLAN segmentation, hierarchical network architecture, and IoT integration for automated control of office devices across multiple departments. Contributed to the project's creative design, documentation, and presentation..

title: Arduino-Based Autonomous Stair-Climbing Robot
description: Developed an Arduino-based autonomous stair-climbing robot using four 12V DC motors. The project focused on embedded programming, motor control, and mechanical design to enable the robot to climb stairs autonomously with stable movement and reliable performance..

title: trainer kit component electronic
description: Developed a basic electronics trainer kit featuring essential electronic components for practical learning and experimentation. The project was designed to help students understand electronic circuits through hands-on practice and component testing..

title: 3D Design of an Automatic Wheelchair Using Autodesk Inventor
description: Created a detailed 3D CAD model of an automatic wheelchair using Autodesk Inventor. The project focused on mechanical design, component integration, and manufacturability to support future prototype development.
